final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY", designed for a Japanese-market skincare product page.

Style/medium: high-fidelity UI mockup, clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents
Composition: three-column hero layout — left text column, center model, right product display — with a header nav bar above and a benefit-card row below; floating stat cards overlaid on the right column
Subject: 
  Header: logo "LUMEA BEAUTY" on the left; 5 navigation links — 「特徴」「成分」「お客様の声」「使い方」「FAQ」; CTA button「今すぐ試す」on the right
  Left column: headline「鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。」; subheadline「乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。」; 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons —「敏感肌OK」「高保湿」「朝晩使える」; 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks —「美容成分をしっかり届ける」「ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ」「続けやすいシンプルケア」; 2 CTA buttons —「初回限定で試してみる >」and「成分をチェック >」; trust badge strip「送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし」
  Center column: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
  Right column: moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle and packaging box displayed; 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents —「満足度 96%」「美容成分 5種配合」「愛用者 12,000人突破」
  Bottom section: 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons —「うるおい」「透明感」「使いやすさ」
Scene/backdrop: white and soft pink background with scattered purple flower petal accents
Lighting/mood: soft, diffused natural light; warm and gentle mood evoking skincare freshness
Color palette: soft pink and white as primary palette, purple flower accents, gold detail accents on stat cards
Materials/textures: smooth glass dropper bottle, matte packaging box, rounded UI card components with subtle drop shadows
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY" / 「特徴」「成分」「お客様の声」「使い方」「FAQ」 / 「今すぐ試す」 / 「鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。」 / 「乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。」 / 「敏感肌OK」「高保湿」「朝晩使える」 / 「美容成分をしっかり届ける」「ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ」「続けやすいシンプルケア」 / 「初回限定で試してみる >」「成分をチェック >」 / 「送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし」 / 「満足度 96%」「美容成分 5種配合」「愛用者 12,000人突破」 / 「うるおい」「透明感」「使いやすさ」
Constraints: all Japanese text must be legible and correctly rendered; three-column hero structure must be clearly readable as a desktop landing page; stat cards must visually float above the product display
Avoid: dark or moody lighting, bold saturated colors, masculine aesthetic, cluttered layout, generic stock-photo style unrelated to skincare

raw:
{"prompt": "Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY", designed for a Japanese-market skincare product page.

Style/medium: high-fidelity UI mockup, clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents
Composition: three-column hero layout — left text column, center model, right product display — with a header nav bar above and a benefit-card row below; floating stat cards overlaid on the right column
Subject: 
  Header: logo "LUMEA BEAUTY" on the left; 5 navigation links — 「特徴」「成分」「お客様の声」「使い方」「FAQ」; CTA button「今すぐ試す」on the right
  Left column: headline「鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。」; subheadline「乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。」; 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons —「敏感肌OK」「高保湿」「朝晩使える」; 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks —「美容成分をしっかり届ける」「ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ」「続けやすいシンプルケア」; 2 CTA buttons —「初回限定で試してみる >」and「成分をチェック >」; trust badge strip「送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし」
  Center column: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
  Right column: moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle and packaging box displayed; 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents —「満足度 96%」「美容成分 5種配合」「愛用者 12,000人突破」
  Bottom section: 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons —「うるおい」「透明感」「使いやすさ」
Scene/backdrop: white and soft pink background with scattered purple flower petal accents
Lighting/mood: soft, diffused natural light; warm and gentle mood evoking skincare freshness
Color palette: soft pink and white as primary palette, purple flower accents, gold detail accents on stat cards
Materials/textures: smooth glass dropper bottle, matte packaging box, rounded UI card components with subtle drop shadows
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY" / 「特徴」「成分」「お客様の声」「使い方」「FAQ」 / 「今すぐ試す」 / 「鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。」 / 「乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。」 / 「敏感肌OK」「高保湿」「朝晩使える」 / 「美容成分をしっかり届ける」「ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ」「続けやすいシンプルケア」 / 「初回限定で試してみる >」「成分をチェック >」 / 「送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし」 / 「満足度 96%」「美容成分 5種配合」「愛用者 12,000人突破」 / 「うるおい」「透明感」「使いやすさ」
Constraints: all Japanese text must be legible and correctly rendered; three-column hero structure must be clearly readable as a desktop landing page; stat cards must visually float above the product display
Avoid: dark or moody lighting, bold saturated colors, masculine aesthetic, cluttered layout, generic stock-photo style unrelated to skincare", "size": "1792x1008", "quality": "medium", "n": 1, "output_format": "png"}
